verifier_rubric: per-paper joint coverage of all K=4 candidate sub-mechanisms
rationale: Max single-paper coverage 1/4 (SAN graph Laplacian, but data graph not attention adjacency). σReparam uses power iteration on linear weights not on attention Laplacian λ_2. Spectral Conditioning targets Q/K/V via SVD, not Cheeger framework. No paper combines all four on attention. Pattern E preserved.
